title: Property Consultant - Liases Foras - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Liases Foras - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Liases Foras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Liases Foras:
Liases Foras is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liases Foras!
